tooltip.retailSales: Retail sales: the number of vehicles delivered by dealers to end consumers. Source: Yiche API retail data.
tooltip.productionSales: Production: the number of vehicles produced and shipped by manufacturers. Source: Yiche API production data.
tooltip.exportSales: Export: the number of vehicles exported from China to overseas markets. Source: Yiche API export data.
tooltip.levelAll: All vehicle levels, including ICE, BEV, PHEV, EREV and all other powertrain types.
tooltip.levelNev: New Energy Vehicles (NEV), including Battery Electric (BEV), Plug-in Hybrid (PHEV), and Extended-Range EV (EREV).
tooltip.levelBev: Battery Electric Vehicle (BEV), powered solely by an onboard battery without an internal combustion engine.
tooltip.yoyGrowth: Year-over-year growth: change versus the same period last year. Formula: (current period - same period last year) / same period last year × 100%.
tooltip.momGrowth: Month-over-month growth: change versus the previous month. Formula: (current month - previous month) / previous month × 100%.
tooltip.qoqGrowth: Quarter-over-quarter growth: change versus the previous quarter. Formula: (current quarter - previous quarter) / previous quarter × 100%.
tooltip.monthlyTrend: Monthly sales trend chart showing sales changes for each month across recent years.
tooltip.quarterlyTrend: Quarterly aggregated sales trend chart: Q1 (Jan-Mar), Q2 (Apr-Jun), Q3 (Jul-Sep), Q4 (Oct-Dec).
tooltip.yearlyTrend: Yearly aggregated sales trend chart showing total sales by year.
tooltip.dataType:
Switch between retail, production and export metrics.
· Retail: the number of vehicles delivered by dealers to end consumers. Source: Yiche API retail data.
· Production: the number of vehicles produced and shipped by manufacturers. Source: Yiche API production data.
· Export: the number of vehicles exported from China to overseas markets. Source: Yiche API export data.

tooltip.salesWithYoyRetail: Brand retail sales and YoY growth. Source: Yiche API brand retail data; YoY = (current period - same period last year) / same period last year × 100%.
tooltip.salesWithYoyProduction: Brand production and YoY growth. Source: Yiche API brand production data; YoY = (current period - same period last year) / same period last year × 100%.
tooltip.trendChart: Sales trend comparison for selected brands, supporting up to 4 brands at the same time.
tooltip.dataType:
Switch between retail and production metrics.
· Retail: the number of vehicles delivered by dealers to end consumers. Source: Yiche API retail data.
· Production: the number of vehicles produced and shipped by manufacturers. Source: Yiche API production data.
tooltip.granularity: Time aggregation: last 12 months, last 24 months, or yearly.
tooltip.selectBrands: Select brands to compare; up to 4 brands can be compared at once.

tooltip.totalSales: Total passenger vehicle sales, used as the denominator when calculating NEV penetration.
tooltip.nevSales: New Energy Vehicle sales, including BEV, PHEV and EREV.
tooltip.penetrationRate: NEV penetration rate: NEV sales as a share of total passenger vehicle sales. Formula: NEV sales / total sales × 100%.
tooltip.bevRatioInNev: BEV share within NEV: BEV sales as a share of total NEV sales. Formula: BEV sales / NEV sales × 100%; PHEV sales = NEV - BEV.
tooltip.penetrationChart:
Monthly trend of NEV penetration rate.
Source: Yiche retail monthly sales.
Formula: NEV Penetration = NEV sales ÷ total passenger vehicle sales × 100% .
tooltip.breakdownChart:
Monthly trend of BEV share within NEV.
Source: Yiche retail monthly sales.
Formula: BEV share = BEV sales ÷ NEV sales × 100%.

tooltip.originShare:
Share of each vehicle origin in total passenger vehicle sales, monthly stacked trend.
Source: CPCA origin classification sales.
Formula: Origin share = origin sales ÷ total sales of all origins × 100%.

common.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.

admin.refreshConfirmContent: This will re-fetch brand metadata, sales, and origin share data from external sources and may take a while. Enter the confirmation code to continue.
admin.refreshConfirmNotConfigured: Refresh confirmation code is not configured.
